# American Express Explorer Credit Card

## Annual Fee
$395 per year

## Earn Rate
- Earn 2 Membership Rewards points per $1 spent on eligible purchases
- Earn 3 Membership Rewards points per $1 spent on selected Amex Travel Online purchases

## Welcome Offer
Earn 50,000 Membership Rewards Bonus Points when you apply online, are approved and spend $4,000 on eligible purchases within the first 3 months of Card Membership.

## Card Details
- Network: American Express
- Purchase rate: 23.99% p.a.
- Up to 55 interest-free days
